scripts.types: wrangler types -c api/wrangler.jsonc --env staging api/worker-configuration.d.ts && wrangler types -c alert-scheduler/wrangler.jsonc --env staging alert-scheduler/worker-configuration.d.ts && wrangler types -c alert-processor/wrangler.jsonc --env staging alert-processor/worker-configuration.d.ts
scripts.type-check: pnpm run types && tsc -p api/tsconfig.json && tsc -p alert-scheduler/tsconfig.json && tsc -p alert-processor/tsconfig.json && tsc -p shared/emails/tsconfig.json && tsc -p tests/tsconfig.json
scripts.build: pnpm run build:staging && pnpm run build:production
scripts.build:staging: wrangler deploy -c api/wrangler.jsonc --env staging --dry-run --outdir dist/staging/api && wrangler deploy -c alert-scheduler/wrangler.jsonc --env staging --dry-run --outdir dist/staging/alert-scheduler && wrangler deploy -c alert-processor/wrangler.jsonc --env staging --dry-run --outdir dist/staging/alert-processor
scripts.build:production: wrangler deploy -c api/wrangler.jsonc --env production --dry-run --outdir dist/production/api && wrangler deploy -c alert-scheduler/wrangler.jsonc --env production --dry-run --outdir dist/production/alert-scheduler && wrangler deploy -c alert-processor/wrangler.jsonc --env production --dry-run --outdir dist/production/alert-processor
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply filecoin-pay-notification-db-staging -c api/wrangler.jsonc --env staging --local
scripts.db:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply filecoin-pay-notification-db-staging -c api/wrangler.jsonc --env staging --remote
scripts.db:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply filecoin-pay-notification-db-production -c api/wrangler.jsonc --env production --remote
scripts.secret:rpc-url:staging: wrangler secret put RPC_URL -c alert-processor/wrangler.jsonc --env staging
scripts.secret:rpc-url:production: wrangler secret put RPC_URL -c alert-processor/wrangler.jsonc --env production
scripts.deploy:staging: wrangler deploy -c api/wrangler.jsonc --env staging && wrangler deploy -c alert-scheduler/wrangler.jsonc --env staging && wrangler deploy -c alert-processor/wrangler.jsonc --env staging
scripts.deploy:production: wrangler deploy -c api/wrangler.jsonc --env production && wrangler deploy -c alert-scheduler/wrangler.jsonc --env production && wrangler deploy -c alert-processor/wrangler.jsonc --env production
